channel.title: Follow-Up Series on AutoZYX Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Follow-Up Series on AutoZYX Blog

item.title: A Bosch Engineer Open-Sourced a Project That Could Change How Every Automotive Engineer Works
item.description: 9 AM. Your project manager pings you: 'We need ASIL decomposition for this ADAS function — get me an updated HARA table before the client review this afternoon.'

item.title: 150K Views, 50 Forks: The Disconnect in AI Tool Adoption
item.description: A Bosch engineer open-sourced a project that could change how every automotive engineer works. After the article went live, this comment appeared:
